overview: Temur Harmonizer Combo leverages mana acceleration and card selection to assemble a lethal sequence quickly. By ramping into multiple lands and drawing into key pieces, the deck aims to bypass traditional combat. The strategy culminates in a sudden burst of damage that closes the game before opponents can stabilize.
win_conditions: Cast Full Bore for lethal damage after ramping into multiple lands.
Use Mightform Harmonizer to generate excess mana and enable oversized spells.
Leverage Consult the Star Charts to find combo pieces and scry away disruption.

keep_criteria: Hands with Mightform Harmonizer and at least two lands.
Hands containing Consult the Star Charts and early ramp.
Hands with Full Bore and enough mana sources to cast it by turn three.
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking lands or mana acceleration.
Hands with only removal or late-game finishers.
Hands missing Consult the Star Charts or Harmonizer in a slow curve.

early_game: Prioritize playing lands and casting Mightform Harmonizer to establish mana advantage.
Use Consult the Star Charts to scry for combo pieces and maintain hand size.
Avoid early combat unless necessary to stabilize against aggro.
mid_game: Continue ramping while filtering your deck for Full Bore.
Protect your Harmonizer and land drops from opponent disruption.
Sequence spells to maximize mana efficiency and trigger any synergies.
late_game: Cast Full Bore once land count reaches lethal threshold.
Use remaining card draw to find answers to board wipes or counterspells.
Close out the game quickly to avoid attrition from opponent's threats.

key_cards.name: Consult the Star Charts
key_cards.notes: Use to filter for Full Bore or Harmonizer, and to scry away opponent's removal or counterspells.

key_cards.name: Mightform Harmonizer
key_cards.notes: Play early to generate extra mana, enabling faster land drops and earlier Full Bore casts.

key_cards.name: Full Bore
key_cards.notes: Hold until you have enough lands to deal lethal damage, then cast as an instant to bypass blockers.

sequencing_tips: Cast Consult the Star Charts before playing lands to scry for combo pieces.
Hold Full Bore in hand until you have sufficient lands and can cast it on opponent's turn.
Prioritize Harmonizer over early removal to maintain combo velocity.
Use scry effects to bury lands when you have enough mana sources.

matchups.advice: Ramp quickly and use Full Bore on their turn to bypass early pressure.
Protect Harmonizer and use scry to avoid counterspells, then go off with Full Bore.
Race their value engines by accelerating mana and finishing before they stabilize.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype name and signature cards imply a ramp-to-finisher combo strategy.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Derived from the mechanical synergy between land ramp, card draw, and a land-counting finisher.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Standard combo piloting principles applied to the provided card interactions.

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Common Standard format threats that disrupt combo and ramp strategies.
